_status: DOCTRINE RATIFIED 2026-07-18 (owner: Jeff Phillips); payer entries are deployment content - an empty table is fail-closed by structure (nothing matches, so nothing auto-posts)
_purpose: Payer contract adjustment rules 08 may cite
_doctrine: ZERO-THRESHOLD RULE (ratified 2026-07-18, permeates all identity blueprints): adjustments matching a loaded payer-contract rule post automatically with the rule citation; ANY other adjustment, ANY amount, moves only on signed human authority. There is no dollar threshold, no 'auto under $X', no de-minimis lane. Reconciliation tolerance is $0.00 - any variance is reconciliation.exception to the human and the books; 'close enough' is the named breach.
